# Hot Yoga Copenhagen

> Premium infrared hot yoga studio in Christianshavn, Copenhagen, Denmark. Operating since 2014. Yoga Alliance registered school since 2015.

## About
Hot Yoga Copenhagen is Copenhagen's premier infrared hot yoga studio, located at Torvegade 66, Christianshavn. We offer 30-35 daily classes across multiple styles (Vinyasa, Power, Yin, Sculpt, Basics, Meditation, Vibro Yoga) in 30-35°C infrared-heated studios. All classes taught in English. 4.9/5 rating from 500+ reviews on TripAdvisor and Google.

## Services
- Hot yoga classes (drop-in from 299 DKK, all levels welcome)
- Monthly memberships (10 classes/month from 999 DKK, unlimited from 1,249 DKK)
- Clip cards (5-200 classes with flexible validity)
- Trial passes (KickStarter: 10 classes in 3 weeks for 599 DKK, Copenhagen residents only)
- Tourist passes (7 days unlimited + mat & towels for 895 DKK)
- Time-based passes (14 days to 12+1 months, no binding)
- Private yoga classes (individuals and groups)
- 200-hour Yoga Teacher Training (Yoga Alliance RYT-200 certified, 3 formats: 4-week intensive, 8-week semi-intensive, 18-week flexible)
- 21-Day Hot Yoga & Vibro Yoga Challenge
- Under-30 discounted pricing on all products

## Class Types
- Hot Vinyasa Flow: Dynamic flowing yoga synchronized with breath (60 min, 35°C)
- Hot Power Yoga: Intense strength-building with arm balances and inversions (60 min)
- Hot Yin Yoga: Slow meditative practice, poses held 3-5 minutes for deep stretching (60 min)
- Hot Yoga Basics: Foundation class for beginners, no experience needed (60 min)
- Hot Flow & Restore: Balanced mix of dynamic flow and restorative holds (60 min)
- Hot Sculpt: High-energy yoga + bodyweight strength exercises, music-driven (60 min)
- Meditation & Breathwork: Guided meditation and pranayama in warm space (45 min)
- Vibro Yoga: Innovative yoga on vibrating platforms for balance and flexibility (45 min)

## Pricing Highlights
- Single class: 299 DKK (275 DKK under 30)
- KickStarter trial: 599 DKK for 10 classes in 3 weeks
- Tourist 7-day pass: 895 DKK (includes mat + towels)
- Unlimited membership: 1,249 DKK/month (999 DKK under 30)
- Best value: 12+1 months unlimited for 12,599 DKK (969 DKK/month)
- All memberships include: towels, showers, herbal tea, post-class snacks

## Studio Features
- Infrared heating panels (30-35°C, warms body directly, not air)
- Two studio rooms with 30-35 weekly classes
- Showers and changing rooms
- Herbal tea lounge with post-class fruit and snacks
- Mat and towel rental available
- Premium members: mat storage, laundry service, personal storage
- Cozy Christianshavn location, open since 2014

## Teacher Training
- Yoga Alliance Registered Yoga School (RYS) since 2015
- 200-hour certification (RYT-200)
- Three format options: 4-week intensive, 8-week semi-intensive, 18-week flexible
- All training conducted in English
- Graduates can teach heated and non-heated yoga worldwide
- Preparation Phase enrollment: 3,750 DKK

## Location
Torvegade 66, 1400 København K, Denmark
Christianshavn neighborhood, 2-minute walk from Christianshavn Metro station

## Hours
Monday-Friday: 06:30-21:00
Saturday-Sunday: 08:00-18:00

- TripAdvisor: 4.9/5 from 500+ reviews
- Google: 4.9/5 stars
- Rated best yoga studio in Copenhagen since 2014

## Languages
All classes taught in English. Website and member area available in Danish and English.
